title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial on building AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, grounded in enterprise data. Covers Model Context Protocol (MCP), MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, Looker API credential setup, and Python environment configuration for creating functional agents that translate prompts into data requests.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through configuring a first AI agent with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, grounding the agent in enterprise data. It covers the Model Context Protocol (MCP), the MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, Looker API credential setup, and Python environment configuration. The result is a functional agent that translates prompts into data requests against Looker.
